maintenanceMode.description: Whether the app is currently in maintenance mode.

welcomeMessage.description: A welcome message displayed to users.

maxGenerationsPerUser.description: Maximum number of generations allowed per user.

defaultImageModel.description: Default AI model used for image generation.

enableVideoGeneration.description: Toggle to enable or disable video generation feature.

updatedBy.description: UID of the admin who last updated the config.

/settings/{documentId}.description: Stores global application settings. Typically a single document named 'config'.
